name: 克劳德官方学术写作技能包
description: 具有同行评审来源、IEEE引用和学术严谨性的学术研究文档。 支持多种文档类型：研究论文、文献综述、学位论文、论文、会议论文和技术报告，具有标准的学术结构。 整合来自Google Scholar、IEEE Xplore、PubMed、ACM数字图书馆和arXiv的来源发现，并内置验证同行评审的可信度和作者资质。 自动生成IEEE格式的参考文献，包括正确的引用编号，处理期刊文章、会议论文、书籍、学位论文、专利和在线来源。 强制执行学术写作标准，包括正式语气、来源整合的信号短语、正确的释义，并在最终确定前进行全面的质量保证检查清单。
descriptionEn: Supports multiple document types: research papers, literature reviews, theses, dissertations, conference papers, and technical reports with standard academic structure Integrates source discovery from Google Scholar, IEEE Xplore, PubMed, ACM Digital Library, and arXiv with built-in verification for peer-review credibility and author credentials Generates IEEE-format references automatically with proper citation numbering, handling journal articles, conference papers, books, theses, patents, and online sources Enforces academic writing standards including formal tone, signal phrases for source integration, proper paraphrasing, and comprehensive quality assurance checklists before finalization

name: 数字生命卡兹克写作风格技能包
description: 数字生命卡兹克（Khazix）的公众号长文写作skill。当用户需要撰写公众号文章、写稿子、续写文章、根据素材产出长文时使用。触发词包括但不限于：写文章、写稿子、帮我写、续写、扩写、公众号文章、长文、出稿、按我的风格写。即使用户只是说"帮我把这个写成文章"或"用我的风格写一下"，只要上下文涉及内容创作和公众号输出，都应该触发。也适用于用户丢过来一个PDF、brief、新闻链接、语音转文字或任何素材说"帮我写篇文章"的场景。不要用于短内容（小红书帖子、推特、朋友圈）或纯标题摘要生成（那个用wechat-title skill）。
descriptionEn: Digital life Khazix's official account long writing skills. It is used when users need to write official account articles, write manuscripts, continue articles, and produce long articles based on materials. Trigger words include but are not limited to: writing articles, writing manuscripts, helping me write, continuing, expanding, official account articles, long articles, publishing manuscripts, and writing in my style. Even if the user just says "help me write this into an article" or "write it in my style", it should be triggered as long as the context involves content creation and official account output. It is also suitable for situations where users throw in a PDF, brief, news link, speech-to-text, or any material that says "help me write an article". Don't use it for short content (Xiaohongshu posts, Twitter, Moments) or pure title summary generation (use the wechat-title skill for that).

name: 张雪峰报志愿
description: 基于5本著作、15+篇权威媒体深度采访、30+条一手语录、 11个关键决策记录和完整人生时间线的深度调研， 提炼5个核心心智模型、8条决策启发式和完整的表达DNA。
descriptionEn: Based on 5 books, 15+ in-depth interviews with authoritative media, 30+ first-hand quotes,  In-depth research on 11 key decision records and a complete life timeline,  Refine 5 core mental models, 8 decision heuristics and complete expression DNA.
